declarations.name: IonButton
declarations.description: Buttons provide a clickable element, which can be used in forms, or anywhere that needs simple, standard button functionality.

members.name: disabled
members.description: If true, the user cannot interact with the button.

members.name: expand
members.description: Set to 'block' for a full-width button or 'full' for a full-width button without left and right borders.

members.name: fill
members.description: Set to 'clear' for no container and no border, 'outline' for no container but has a border, and 'solid' (default) for container and border.

members.name: color
members.description: The color to use from your application's color palette.

members.name: size
members.description: The button size.

members.name: href
members.description: Contains a URL or a URL fragment that the hyperlink points to.

members.name: routerDirection
members.description: When using a router, it specifies the transition direction when navigating to another page using href.

events.name: ionFocus
events.description: Emitted when the button has focus.

events.name: ionBlur
events.description: Emitted when the button loses focus.

slots.description: Content is placed between the named slots if provided without a slot.

slots.name: icon-only
slots.description: Should be used on an icon in a button that has no text.

slots.name: start
slots.description: Content is placed to the left of the button text in LTR, and to the right in RTL.

slots.name: end
slots.description: Content is placed to the right of the button text in LTR, and to the left in RTL.

declarations.name: IonModal
declarations.description: A Modal is a dialog that appears on top of the app's content, and must be dismissed by the app before interaction can resume.

members.name: isOpen
members.description: If true, the modal will open. If false, the modal will close.

members.name: breakpoints
members.description: A decimal value between 0 and 1 that indicates the point after which the sheet modal will attempt to snap.

members.name: initialBreakpoint
members.description: A decimal value between 0 and 1 that indicates the initial point the modal will open at.

members.name: backdropDismiss
members.description: If true, the modal will be dismissed when the backdrop is clicked.

events.name: ionModalDidPresent
events.description: Emitted after the modal has presented.

events.name: ionModalWillPresent
events.description: Emitted before the modal has presented.

events.name: ionModalDidDismiss
events.description: Emitted after the modal has dismissed.

events.name: ionModalWillDismiss
events.description: Emitted before the modal has dismissed.

slots.description: Content is placed inside the modal.

declarations.name: IonInput
declarations.description: The input component is a wrapper to the HTML input element with custom styling and additional functionality.

members.name: label
members.description: The visible label associated with the input.

members.name: value
members.description: The value of the input.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: Instructional text that shows before the input has a value.

members.name: type
members.description: The type of control to display.

members.name: disabled
members.description: If true, the user cannot interact with the input.

members.name: readonly
members.description: If true, the element will have its spelling and grammar checked.

members.name: clearInput
members.description: If true, a clear icon will appear in the input when there is a value.

members.name: counter
members.description: If true, a character counter will display the ratio of characters used and the total character limit.

events.name: ionInput
events.description: The ionInput event is fired each time the user modifies the input's value.

events.name: ionChange
events.description: The ionChange event is fired when the user modifies the input's value.

events.name: ionFocus
events.description: Emitted when the input has focus.

events.name: ionBlur
events.description: Emitted when the input loses focus.

slots.name: start
slots.description: Content to display at the leading edge of the input.

slots.name: end
slots.description: Content to display at the trailing edge of the input.

slots.name: label
slots.description: The label text to associate with the input.

declarations.name: IonSelect
declarations.description: Selects are form controls to select an option, or options, from a set of options.

members.name: label
members.description: The visible label associated with the select.

members.name: value
members.description: The value of the select.

members.name: multiple
members.description: If true, the select can accept multiple values.

members.name: disabled
members.description: If true, the user cannot interact with the select.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: The text to display when the select is empty.

members.name: cancelText
members.description: The text to display on the cancel button.

members.name: okText
members.description: The text to display on the ok button.

events.name: ionChange
events.description: Emitted when the value has changed.

events.name: ionFocus
events.description: Emitted when the select has focus.

events.name: ionBlur
events.description: Emitted when the select loses focus.

events.name: ionCancel
events.description: Emitted when the selection is cancelled.

events.name: ionDismiss
events.description: Emitted when the overlay is dismissed.
